hero.title: Practice Cantonese every day — with the voice you already have.
hero.subtitle: An AI assistant tool for daily speech practice at home. For SEN students, families, and the schools and NGOs supporting them.
hero.pipiAlt: PiPi the parrot mascot, listening and ready to practise

schools.title: Daily practice within reach of every learner you support.
schools.subtitle: AI voice cloning makes 1-to-1 Cantonese practice affordable at scale. Track tone accuracy, attempt history and progress across your entire SEN programme.
schools.costDesc: Daily practice costs less than one weekly session. Scales with your programme.
schools.trackingDesc: See tone accuracy, streak data and attempt history. Export reports for coordinators.
schools.privateDesc: Voice data on HK servers. PDPO-aligned. Built for schools with minors.

professionals.title: A practice partner between your sessions.
professionals.subtitle: Assign exercises, track tone accuracy, reclaim in-person time for the work AI can't do. Fits your workflow.
professionals.assignDesc: Set exercises for learners or groups. See who's practising, who's stuck, where to focus next.
professionals.reportsDesc: Weekly summaries show accuracy trends, streak momentum, areas needing attention. Share with families instantly.
professionals.flowDesc: Works alongside your approach. Complements the work of teachers and speech professionals — doesn't replace.

families.title: Practice at home — in your own voice.
families.subtitle: Daily Cantonese exercises shaped around your child's voice and pace. Recommended by their school's SEN team. PiPi guides them with patience and warmth.
families.note: If your school uses SpeakAble HK, your family can join.
families.pipiAlt: PiPi the parrot at home, ready to listen

footer.title: Ready to bring SpeakAble HK to your school?
footer.subtitle: Applications open for summer 2026 pilot. Partner with us to make daily practice possible.
footer.note: Pilot runs June–August 2026 · invite-only · limited spaces

roleSelect.title: Welcome to SpeakAble HK
roleSelect.subtitle: Choose your role to start practicing Cantonese.

student.title: Students
student.desc: I'm a student who wants to practice Cantonese daily.

professional.title: Professionals & Admins
professional.desc: I'm a teacher, speech professional, or school/org admin managing students and programs.

public.title: General Public
public.desc: I want to learn about speech support or try basic AI features.

practice.comingSoonDesc: This exercise is on its way — check back soon!

settings.title: Settings
settings.analyticsDesc: When off, no analytics are saved on this device (recommended: your recordings are never uploaded).

progress.title: Progress
progress.noActivity: No exercises completed yet — go practise!
